name: thinkDecade
desc: A long-form research and writing platform at the intersection of AI, crypto rails, and human agency. Exploring what it means to build identity and wealth in the age of intelligent machines.

name: Sovereign Frontier
desc: A newsletter and podcast examining how emerging economies — particularly in West Africa — can architect their sovereignty in the digital age through crypto, policy, and institutional design.

name: [ Next ]
desc: Something in the making. Thinking about AI agents, local infrastructure, and what ownership looks like for Ghanaians online. More soon.
